name: smartsell
description: SmartSell marketplace platform - products, used goods, shops, services, and custom requests.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.check: npm run audit && npm run audit:css && npm run audit:api && npm run audit:workflow && npm run audit:server && npm run build --prefix client
